code.description: C# code to compile and execute in Unity Editor. Written as the body of a static method. Use print(obj) or printJson(obj) to return results. When the user asks to display results, tool output is intermediate context only; the final assistant message must restate, summarize, or organize the relevant results.

request_editor_status.description: Required Unity Editor status before running. If the current status must change, Locus asks the user for permission before continuing.
